question: ¿Cómo es la financiación de buenvista?
notes: TOOL-ORCHESTRATION DEFECT (2026-06-09): Buenavista is an in-corpus LENDER / participative-loan instrument for MAD (Buenavista Nextgen Urbano S.I.C.C.; crédito participativo, máx 15.657.498,18€), NOT a top-level project. The agent must NOT deny its existence from get_portfolio_context (which only lists MAD/BHX/KLP/PHILAE/GVF) — it MUST search_documents and FIND it. Deliberate typo ('buenvista') also tests spelling-variant robustness. Correct answer is documentary (cites the financing contract), NOT an abstain/clarify. Guards the prompt rule added to agent.ts (verified: before fix the agent called only get_portfolio_context and denied; after fix it searches and finds 12 sources).

question: ¿Cómo es la financiación del prestamista Sukarrieta en el proyecto de Madrid?
notes: ADVERSARIAL COUNTERPART to mad-buenavista-lender (Ronda-1 finding #2): 'Sukarrieta' is a plausible-sounding but ABSENT named lender. The fix forces a search_documents before denying — this case guards that the search-before-deny rule does NOT tip into hallucination: after the search returns only low-relevance top-k chunks (vector search always returns something), the agent MUST still abstain ('no encuentro evidencia de un prestamista Sukarrieta'), NOT manufacture a financing structure. So: must call search_documents AND must abstain.
